name: noor
description: Noor — A reverent Islamic educational companion. Quran, Names of Allah, wisdom, and remembrance.

scripts.build: mkdir -p www/fonts www/assets && cp index.html www/index.html && cp sw.js www/sw.js && cp manifest.webmanifest www/manifest.webmanifest && cp assets/fonts/*.ttf www/fonts/ && cp assets/*.png www/assets/ && npx cap copy android
scripts.add-android: mkdir -p www/fonts www/assets && cp index.html www/index.html && cp sw.js www/sw.js && cp manifest.webmanifest www/manifest.webmanifest && cp assets/fonts/*.ttf www/fonts/ && cp assets/*.png www/assets/ && npx cap add android
